subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a branch from among the branches of the Tree of Thy mercy, and a tree from the gardens of Thy Word of Oneness, and a lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا فرع من فروع سدره رحمانیتک و دوحه من حدائق کلمه وحدانیتک و سراج
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayer for protection
